journey.name: 04-types
journey.description: 类型/分类管理：一级与二级类型增删改。

actions.action: Open the navigation drawer and navigate to the categories/types (分类/类型) management screen
Create a new first-level category named "测试一级类型"
Verify "测试一级类型" appears in the category list
Add a second-level category named "测试二级类型" under "测试一级类型"
Verify "测试二级类型" appears under "测试一级类型"
Verify it no longer appears and the app does not crash
